heading: Technical assistance to U.S. Customs and Border Protection
label: 1304a Technical assistance to U.S. Customs and Border Protection
text: The Secretary of Agriculture shall make available to U.S. Customs and Border Protection technical assistance related to the identification of produce represented as grown in the United States when it is not in fact grown in the United States.
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Agricultural Act of 2014, and not as part of the Tariff Act of 1930 which comprises this chapter.
